CustomField.description: Aggregate Queries usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsAggregateQueriesMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsAggregateQueriesConsumed__c / LimitsAggregateQueriesMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.AggregateQueries.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsAggregateQueriesConsumed__c / LimitsAggregateQueriesMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.AggregateQueries.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsAggregateQueriesConsumed__c / LimitsAggregateQueriesMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsAggregateQueriesConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsAggregateQueriesMax__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Aggregate Queries usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: Aggregate Queries
